allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Initial commit: SunSpec Modbus TCP server for ESP32

- Implements SunSpec Model 1 \(Common\) and Model 103 \(Three-Phase Inverter\)
- Simulates Growatt 9000 TL3-S inverter with realistic values
- WiFi captive portal for configuration
- Fixed register layout \(Model 103 at offset 69\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Reduce simulated power to minimal values for testing

- Set INVERTER_MAX_POWER to 10W to avoid affecting real system
- Lower power threshold from 50W to 1W

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
